options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <partitionName {list}> # Specifies list of partition names

options.name: -defNoCutRow
options.description: Rows are not cut against placement obstructions, block halos, or power domain fence

options.name: -def_netlist_for_eco
options.description: Writes out the DEF file with unplaced netlist to be used by create_pushdown_eco

options.name: -def_no_std_cells
options.description: Do not write standard cells in def file

options.name: -def_no_trial_route
options.description: Do not write trial routed wires def file

options.name: -module_model_tag
options.description: Specifies module model tag to be used

options.name: -noFPlan
options.description: Do not generates a floorplan file

options.name: -noNetlist
options.description: Do not generates a netlist file

options.name: -ptnLib
options.description: Specifies an OpenAccess database library directory

options.name: -ptnSite
options.description: Outputs sites for partitions in the LEF file

options.name: -topLevelNoPtnModule
options.description: Suppresses stub verilog modules for partitions in the top-level partition netlist

options.name: -topView
options.description: Specifies view name for top design

options.name: -verilog
options.description: save design as non-binary verilog file
